cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.body: This site uses essential technical cookies and analytics cookies to improve your experience. No personal data is shared with third parties.

landing.feature_teacher_loop_body: The teacher maintains full control over prompts, publications and instructional workflows, always ensuring human supervision.
landing.feature_privacy_body: Secure, per-tenant isolated data. Student data is never used to train external models.
landing.feature_ai_edu_body: A platform designed for education — no automatic scoring or invasive evaluations.
landing.feature_multimodal_body: Chat, documents, images and quizzes integrated into a single collaborative classroom environment.

login.title: Teacher / Admin Login
login.subtitle: Sign in or request beta access.
login.intro: A modern platform for AI-assisted teaching in a structured, transparent and education-compliant way.
login.feature1: The teacher keeps control over prompts, publications and instructional workflows.
login.feature2: Data managed with minimisation, tenant segregation and operational traceability.
login.feature3: Educational use without automatic scoring or evaluation of students.
login.feature4: Chat, documents, images, quizzes and reports in a single classroom environment.
login.feature5: Platform designed to orchestrate classroom activities with specialised assistants.
login.feature6: Hands-on labs for datasets, analysis and guided visualisations.

teacher_request.title: Request Teacher Access
teacher_request.subtitle: Fill in the form to request teacher access
teacher_request.card_subtitle: Enter your details for the request
teacher_request.success_body: Your request has been sent successfully. You will receive a notification once it is approved by the administrator.

student_join.title: Student Login
student_join.subtitle: No registration needed — just the code and a nickname
student_join.code_intro: Enter the code provided by your teacher

activate.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
activate.password_copied_body: The password has been copied to your clipboard
activate.password_updated_body: You can now sign in with your new password
activate.title: Account Activation
activate.credentials_desc: These are the credentials to access the platform
activate.password_already_changed: The password has already been changed. You can still change it again.
activate.success_desc: Your account is ready. You can now sign in with your new password.
activate.change_password_desc: We recommend setting a personal password
activate.temp_login_hint: You can also sign in directly with the temporary password.

navbar.create_session_hint: Create a new session from the Classes page

teacher_dashboard.chat_hint: Select a session to view the chat.

teacher_chat.invalid_state: Invalid state. Please reselect Quiz mode.
teacher_chat.generation_error: An error occurred during generation. Please try again.
teacher_chat.quiz_generation_error: An error occurred during quiz generation. Please try again.
teacher_chat.generation_error_check_console: An error occurred during generation. Please check the console for technical details.
teacher_chat.quiz_interview_intro:
Quiz mode active. I'll guide you through a quick interview.

1) What topic do you want the quiz to cover?
teacher_chat.quiz_interview_q2: 2) How many questions do you want in the quiz? (enter a number)
teacher_chat.quiz_interview_q3: 3) How many answer options per question? (enter a number)
teacher_chat.quiz_interview_q4: 4) Do you want to add highlights? If yes, write them (otherwise reply "no").
teacher_chat.image_interview_intro:
Image mode active. I'll guide you through a quick interview.

1) Who is the subject of the image?
teacher_chat.image_interview_q2: 2) What is happening in the scene?
teacher_chat.image_interview_q4: 4) What visual style do you prefer? (e.g. realistic, cartoon, watercolour, 3D)
teacher_chat.dataset_interview_q1: Great. Let's start: what is the dataset context? (e.g. school sales, test results, attendance)
teacher_chat.dataset_interview_q2: What type of data do you want? (numerical, categorical, mixed, time-series...)
teacher_chat.dataset_interview_q3: What relationship/correlation do you want between the data? (positive, negative, none, non-linear...)
teacher_chat.dataset_interview_q4: How many columns should the CSV have? (enter a number only)
teacher_chat.dataset_interview_q5: Provide the column headers, comma-separated (e.g. age,score,study_hours).
teacher_chat.dataset_interview_q6: How many rows should the dataset have? (enter a number only)
teacher_chat.report_interview_intro:
Report mode active. I'll guide you through a quick interview.

1) Which session are you interested in?
teacher_chat.report_interview_q2: 2) What do you want to know? (completed tasks, chatbot interactions, teacher interactions, other)
teacher_chat.report_interview_q3: 3) Do you want a report for the whole class or specific students? If specific, list their names/nicknames comma-separated.

classes.title: Classes & Sessions Management
classes.subtitle: Monitor your classes and manage active sessions from a single panel.
classes.no_sessions_hint: Start a new session to begin working with the class.
classes.empty_body: Start by creating your first class to run work sessions with students.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.select_class_hint: Choose a class to view and manage its sessions
sessions.empty_body: Create the first session for this class
sessions.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session?

student_dashboard.chatbot_desc: Your smart personal assistant. Ask for help, generate ideas or get complex concepts explained.
student_dashboard.ml_desc: Machine Learning Laboratory. Train models to classify text and images in real time.
student_dashboard.docs_desc: Create documents and presentations. Send your work to the teacher for review.
student_dashboard.quiz_desc: Test yourself! Complete quizzes, earn badges and track your learning progress.
student_dashboard.welcome_body: Choose a tool to start working
student_dashboard.welcome_desktop: Choose a tool from the left panel to start working
student_dashboard.tools_subtitle: Choose a tool to get started
student_dashboard.welcome_body_mobile: Ready for a new learning session?

tasks.title: My Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Manage your activities and view feedback
tasks.empty_body: The teacher has not published any activities for this session yet.
tasks.no_description: No description provided for this task.
tasks.submitted_body: Your task has been submitted successfully.
tasks.no_feedback: The teacher has not left a comment yet.
tasks.submit_error_body: Please try again in a moment.

chatbot.profile_tutor_desc: Explains topics step by step with simple, level-appropriate examples.
chatbot.profile_quiz_desc: Builds personalised quizzes and helps you revise actively.
chatbot.profile_interview_desc: Simulates dialogues with historical or scientific figures to better understand context.
chatbot.profile_interview_p1: I want to interview a character
chatbot.profile_oral_desc: Simulates a realistic oral exam with progressive questions and feedback on clarity and completeness.
chatbot.profile_dataset_desc: Creates coherent CSV datasets with the scenario, variables and difficulty you request.
chatbot.profile_dataset_p1: Guide me through creating a dataset
chatbot.profile_math_desc: Guides you through problem-solving with method, clear steps and error checking.
chatbot.quiz_interview_intro:
Guided Quiz mode active.

1) What topic do you want to practise?
chatbot.quiz_interview_q2: 2) How many questions do you want? (number)
chatbot.quiz_interview_q3: 3) What level do you want? (basic, intermediate, advanced)
chatbot.quiz_interview_q4: 4) Do you want to focus on theory, applications or both?
chatbot.interview_intro:
Guided Interview mode active.

1) Which character would you like to interview? If you're not sure, I can suggest someone based on a historical period or topic.
chatbot.interview_q2: 2) What historical period or theme do you want to explore?
chatbot.interview_q3: 3) Do you prefer a formal, popular-science or creative tone?
chatbot.interview_q4: 4) Interview goal: revision, deeper understanding or exam preparation?
chatbot.oral_intro:
Guided Oral Exam mode active.

1) Subject and main topic?
chatbot.oral_q2: 2) Which sub-topics do you want to include?
chatbot.oral_q3: 3) Expected level: basic, intermediate or advanced?
chatbot.oral_q4: 4) Do you want quick or detailed feedback after each answer?
chatbot.dataset_intro:
Guided Dataset mode active.

1) In what context do you want to use the dataset?
chatbot.dataset_q2: 2) What main columns do you want?
chatbot.dataset_q3: 3) How many rows do you want? (number)
chatbot.dataset_q4: 4) Do you want specific constraints (ranges, correlations, categories)?
chatbot.math_intro:
Guided Math Coach mode active.

1) Which mathematical topic do you want to work on?
chatbot.math_q2: 2) Goal: understand theory, solve exercises or prepare for a test?
chatbot.math_q3: 3) Current perceived level: basic, intermediate or advanced?
chatbot.math_q4: 4) Do you prefer concise or detailed step-by-step explanations?

classification.vocab_too_small: Vocabulary too small. Load more texts with different words.
classification.title: Classification with Machine Learning
classification.subtitle: Choose the type of data to classify
classification.mode_images_desc: Classify images from the webcam in real time
classification.mode_data_desc: Classification and regression on CSV tabular data
classification.no_samples: No samples. Hold the button to capture.
classification.drag_hint: 💡 You can also drag a CSV here
classification.no_model_hint: Load a dataset and train the model to test classification
classification.target_col_hint: Choose the column you want to predict. The system will automatically suggest the analysis type.
classification.min_samples_image: Collect at least 10 total samples to train the model
classification.min_samples_text: Load at least 10 samples with at least 2 different labels

documents.sent_body: The teacher will receive your work in the tasks section.
documents.sent_teacher_info: The teacher will be able to view your work in the session's Tasks section.
documents.delete_draft_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this draft?
documents.ai_needs_selection: The AI needs a text selection to work

content_editor.subtitle: You can edit the content before publishing

content_editor.explanation_placeholder: Explain why this is the correct answer...

artifact_preview.save_draft_info: Saving as a draft lets you assign it later.

artifact_preview.edit_hint: Edit the generated content before saving.

teacherbot.published_body: Students can now interact with this assistant
teacherbot.initial_message_placeholder: e.g. Hi! I'm here to help you with maths. Which topic would you like to work on today?
teacherbot.name_required: Name and System Prompt are required

teacherbot.publish_desc: Select the class to publish this assistant to. Students will be able to interact with the bot during sessions.
teacherbot.all_published: All classes have already been published
teacherbot.proactive_desc: The bot introduces itself and starts with a question
teacherbot.report_prompt_placeholder: Leave empty to use the default prompt
teacherbot.system_prompt_desc: Define the personality and behaviour of your assistant.
teacherbot.system_prompt_tip: 💡 Tip: Select text to activate the AI optimizer.
